title: Electrostatic Potential Gradient Fixture
summary: Design note for a small electrode fixture intended to map relative potential around simple conductor and dielectric arrangements.
objective: Create a repeatable fixture for observing how electrode geometry, spacing, and dielectric placement alter measured potential.
apparatus: Insulated base, interchangeable electrode plates, dielectric samples, high-impedance voltmeter, fixed measurement grid, discharge lead, and safety spacing marks.
observations: The fixture must prioritize repeatable probe position and a clear discharge procedure. Public results should include geometry drawings before numerical readings are compared.
next: Fabricate the first electrode plate assembly and publish the measurement grid before energizing the setup.

measurements.label: Recorded conditions
measurements.value: Applied voltage, probe position, dielectric material, humidity if available
